title: Lunar Client Fire Fix
description: Replace the fire texture of Lunar Client with vanilla texture.
body:
# Lunar Client Fire Fix

![](https://i.imgur.com/dbc1fcK.png)

The objective of this resource pack is to remove the 32x texture from the fire imposed by Lunar Client (because it cannot be disabled) and replace it by the default one (vanilla)

There is no option integrated in the client to disable the application of this texture, the only existing way is to use a resource pack.

**See the gallery to view the changes made.**

This pack is compatible with [all the versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lunar-client-fire-fix/versions) offered by the Lunar Client.

The version of the texture used is relative to the version of Minecraft, as well as the compatibility range. For example, `Lunar Client Fire Fix 1.13` uses the original Minecraft v1.14.4 texture, because this pack is compatible on the range 1.13-1.14.4.
